base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fruit_bonus_galaxian — a pickup_item from 1980 pac man. Galaxian-ship bonus (homage to Namco's earlier game) — 2000 points. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Galaxian-ship bonus (homage to Namco's earlier game) — 2000 points; levels 10-11
